verse.name: V1
verse.lines: My God is awesome He can move the mountains Keep me in the valley HIde me from the rain My God is awesome Heals me when im broken Strength where I've been weakened Forever He will reign

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: My God is awesome Awesome, awesome, awesome My God is awesome Awesome, awesome, awesome

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: My God is awesome Saviour of the whole world Giver of salvation By His stripes Iam healed My God is awesome Today Iam forgiven His grace is why I'm living Praise His holy name

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: My God is awesome Awesome, awesome, awesome My God is awesome Awesome, awesome, awesome
